description: Configure a high-fidelity 'Septic Shock' simulation scenario in OpenICE using a simulated 'Multiparameter Monitor' and 'Infusion Pump'. Set the device parameters to Heart Rate: 115 bpm, Invasive Blood Pressure (IBP): 82/45 mmHg, Temperature: 39.2 C, and Infusion Rate: 250 mL/hr. Use the 'Vital Signs' clinical application to confirm data flow. Save a screenshot of the Vital Signs app showing these values to '/home/ga/Desktop/sepsis_vitals_evidence.png' and write a JSON configuration report to '/home/ga/Desktop/sepsis_config.json' with keys 'heart_rate', 'bp_systolic', 'bp_diastolic', 'temperature', and 'infusion_rate'.
